events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: the missing weld is a **fail** — non-compliant, installed-defective, high risk — since it leaves the connection's load path incomplete relative to the drawing. Actions require holding closeout on that joint, notifying the CWI/EOR, completing the weld per the approved WPS, and re-inspecting (visual + NDT per AWS D1.1 Section 6) before acceptance.
